title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!
